summary: Fuzzy Matching for Excel Import with CPOS Codes - All 8 tests passed. The normalize_str() function correctly strips product codes (CPOS, WLJH74, DJ7X91, etc.) from trim names during composite key matching (brand+model+trim+year), allowing imports with modified trim names to successfully match and update existing programs with 0 errors. Comparison before/after feature captures and displays changes correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: normalize_str() in programs.py correctly handles: (CPOS xxx), (WLJH74), (DJ7X91), (KMJL74), (DT6P98), (ETM) - regex patterns working as expected
normalize_model() handles model name variations like 'Grand Cherokee/Grand Cherokee L' -> 'grand cherokee/l'
find_best_match() implements 5 strategies: exact match, trim None vs '', normalized model+trim, partial trim match, partial model match
Comparison system captures snapshot before import and calculates field-by-field diffs correctly
Programs export returns valid xlsx with 81 programs across 2 sheets (Programmes, Instructions)
SCI export returns valid xlsx with 3 sheets (Lease 2026, Lease 2025, Instructions)
seed_data_creation: None - all test data reverted after each test using pytest fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fuzzy matching with CPOS codes fully tested and working. The normalize_str() function strips (CPOS xxx) and product codes while preserving descriptive text like (excluding PHEV). Previous iteration_16 tested basic import/export comparison. This iteration_17 specifically validated the fuzzy matching behavior with modified trim names containing appended product codes.

verified_endpoints.POST /api/programs/import-excel with CPO: 200 OK - Fuzzy matching successful, 0 errors, updated=1
verified_endpoints.POST /api/programs/import-excel with WLJ: 200 OK - Product code stripped, matching works
verified_endpoints.GET /api/programs/comparison/{id}: 200 OK - Returns specific comparison with avant/apres details
verified_endpoints.GET /api/programs/export-excel: 200 OK - Returns valid xlsx (15705 bytes, 81 programs)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/sci/comparisons: 200 OK - Returns history of 5 SCI comparisons

test_case_4.description: Fresh vehicle without existing CPOS (Ram ProMaster)
test_case_4.result: Matched successfully, 0 errors, comparison shows change
